name: Temperate Harbor
description: Mild seasons, workable forests, and reliable fishing make this climate flexible and forgiving.

name: Woven Hinterland Coast
description: River-fed flats and textile farming support cloth, dyes, and traded staples.

name: Arid Spice Coast
description: Dry heat, mineral ground, and caravan trade favor spice, salt, and high-value goods.

name: Delta Marsh
description: Wet channels and brackish shallows reward patient fishers, gatherers, and practical traders.

name: Luxury Isles
description: Warm island waters and elite demand encourage rare goods, fine processing, and prestige cargo.
